## Outcome

<!-- What user or operational outcome does this change deliver? -->

## Scope

<!-- List the bounded changes. Call out deliberate non-goals. -->

## Risk and rollback

<!-- Describe data, auth, email, AI, deployment, or UX risk and the rollback path. -->

## Verification

- [ ] Lint passes
- [ ] TypeScript passes
- [ ] Automated tests pass
- [ ] Production build passes
- [ ] New behavior has regression coverage or a documented reason why not
- [ ] UI changes were checked on desktop and mobile
- [ ] No secret, real resume, candidate export, or private identifier is included
- [ ] Documentation and environment examples are updated when contracts change

## Evidence

<!-- Screenshots, recordings, test output, live preview, or migration notes. -->
